detail.description:
Experience the familiar thrill of authentic adventure! "The Song of the Wind and Dragons" is now available!

Get the SR companion, Moribanba, just by downloading!

Furthermore, various campaigns offering generous rewards are currently running on the official X to celebrate the release!

A thousand years ago, humans and dragons forged a pact with the wind and soared through the skies together.

Now, the dragons hide in the abyss of storms, leaving only legends behind.
